steps.title: Translate the time variable
steps.content: The variable $t$ means years after $2000$. So the year $2000$ is $t=0$ with population $862$, and the year $2010$ is $t=10$ with population $846$.

steps.title: Write the linear model
steps.content: The model is $$ P(t)=862-1.6t $$ The answer is A.
